task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a text editor (like nano or vi) open in the Sugar Terminal with Python code for dna_analyzer.py, or the cat command displaying the script's contents.

task_completion.description: Execute the Python script in the Sugar Terminal
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the command python3 dna_analyzer.py (or similar) being run in the Sugar Terminal.
Screenshots show the insulin_report.txt file being opened or its contents printed to the terminal (e.g., using cat /home/ga/Documents/insulin_report.txt).

task_completion.description: The report contains the correct total sequence length
task_completion.visual_evidence: The displayed contents of insulin_report.txt include the sequence length, showing the value 465.

task_completion.description: The report contains the correct nucleotide counts
task_completion.visual_evidence: The displayed contents of insulin_report.txt include the nucleotide counts: A: 97, C: 172, G: 131, T: 65.

task_completion.description: The report contains the correct GC content percentage
task_completion.visual_evidence: The displayed contents of insulin_report.txt include the GC content percentage, showing a value of 65.16 (or roughly 65%).

task_completion.description: The report contains the transcribed mRNA sequence
task_completion.visual_evidence: The displayed contents of insulin_report.txt include a long sequence string containing U instead of T, representing the transcribed mRNA.

integrity.description: The script calculates the values rather than hardcoding them
integrity.visual_evidence: The Python script does not simply print or write hardcoded values (465, 97, 172, 131, 65, 65.16) to the report, but actually contains logic to read the FASTA file, calculate the metrics, and perform the transcription.

integrity.description: The agent used the Sugar Terminal as requested
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent used the Sugar Terminal for writing and executing the script, rather than a GUI IDE or text editor outside the terminal.

integrity.description: The report is saved to a file
integrity.visual_evidence: The report is actually saved to a file at /home/ga/Documents/insulin_report.txt and not just printed to the standard output in the terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected sequence length is exactly 465. The expected nucleotide counts are A: 97, C: 172, G: 131, T: 65. The expected GC content is 65.16%.
